name: Urk (Netherlands)

colors.symbolism: the inner stripes and the fish

description: A dark-blue field bordered top and bottom by white and red stripes, charged in the centre with a white cod.
history: Flag of the municipality of Urk in the province of Flevoland. Formerly an island in the Zuiderzee and long a fishing community, Urk became connected to the mainland by the Noordoostpolder; the cod reflects its fishing heritage.

features.role: a dark-blue field between white and red edge stripes
